# Titans of Direct Response Mastermind Council

> AI copywriter council with 18 legendary copywriter agents, 3 leadership agents, and a 3-agent Quality Gate.

## What This Is

A productized AI pipeline that runs any offer through 18 legendary copywriter agents (Schwartz, Abraham, Brown, Kennedy, Hormozi, and 13 more). Each agent independently analyzes the offer, then they deliberate through 3 council rounds to produce production-ready positioning, messaging, and launch strategy. A 3-agent Quality Gate reviews everything before it ships.

## How It Works

1. User provides a brief about an offer
2. 18 copywriter agents each produce an independent take (parallel batches of 6)
3. Council deliberation: Round 1 (V1), Round 2 (V2), Round 3 (Final)
4. Quality Gate: Creator validates, Critic stress-tests, Approver decides ship/revise/send-back
5. Optional Content Multiplier: up to 32 content pieces
6. Deliverables packaged with client-facing README and published to private GitHub repo

## Key Entry Points

- CLAUDE.md: Full pipeline instructions (primary source of truth)
- AGENTS.md: Complete agent roster
- .claude/commands/titans.md: The /titans slash command
- features.json: Machine-readable capability manifest
- Titan-Genome-Content-Multiplier/SWIPE_FILE_CONTEXT.md: The copywriting DNA patterns

## Agent Types

- 18 Copywriter Agents (automatic): agents/*.md
- 3 Leadership Agents (invoke-only): agents/leadership/*.md
- 3 Quality Gate Agents (automatic after council): agents/quality_gate/*.md
- 2 Infrastructure Agents (on-demand): .claude/agents/*.md

## Project Structure

- projects/{client-name}/{project-name}/ -- All client deliverables
- agents/ -- Agent definition files
- Titan-Genome-Content-Multiplier/ -- Library, templates, swipe files, Titan Genome DNA

## Rules Summary

- Each project is isolated (no cross-project memory)
- All 18 copywriters participate in every project
- Individual takes before council (never skip)
- Exactly 3 council rounds
- Quality Gate is mandatory before publishing
- Every idea credits its originating copywriter
- No generic AI output -- every piece reflects a specific copywriter voice
